case_title: ABC WINDOW CONTRACTORS, INC. VS D. STEWART THOMPSON, INC.

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT D. STEWART THOMPSON, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ABC WINDOW CONTRACTORS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT D. STEWART THOMPSON, INC. $2,280.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,300.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
